programmes.show_description: The Munchurian Candidate: Anarchic animated sitcom. Lois hypnotises Peter into fulfilling her sexual needs, and Stewie renovates his treehouse to try to win over Brian and Chris.

A League of His Own: US animated comedy series. Steve profiles Stan, Hayley aims to break Steve out of hero-worshipping his father, and Francine is locked in a portaloo.
Manic Pixie C*** Show: Animated comedy. Millie blackmails Louise into getting a bunch of collectible fairy wands from the annual Pixie Princess Promenade when she is banned from it.
